professor.name: LU Yao
professor.title: 教授
professor.biography_text: 主要研究兴趣包括图像图形处理、目标跟踪与视频监控、图像检测与分析、模式识别和机器学习、视觉神经计算等。在 IEEE TIP、IEICE IS、IJIST、IJRS 重要国际刊物和 CVPR、ICIP、ICPR、ACCV、ICONIP 等重要国际会议以及软件学报、自动化学报等国内一级学报上发表学术论文 80 余篇，编写教材 1 部。承担和参加国家自然科学基金、教育部高等学校博士学科点专项基金（博导类）、北京市自然科学基金、发改委专项、航天十二五专项和企业联合的产学研等科研项目。 His research interests include Image Processing, Object Tracking, Videosurveillance, Patten Recognition and Machine Learning, Neural Network. He has published more than 80 papers on International Journals and Conferences such as IEEE TIP、IEICE IS、IJIST、IJRS 重要国际刊物和 CVPR、ICIP、ICPR、ACCV、ICONIP and so on. He has finished or undertaken research projects sponsored by NSFC, BJNSF, MOEC and some enterprises.

warnings: The English education entry 'BD of Eng. Automotical Depart. Northeast University, China' is ambiguous and not used as a primary source; the Chinese version is used.

The English work experience entry for 'July 2004 to present' lists 'School of Computer, Beijing Institute of Technology, China' while the Chinese lists '北京理工大学计算机学院'. Both refer to the same organization but with different names; the Chinese version is used for the organization name.

The English work experience entry for 'Dec.2015' lists 'Sydney Institute of Technology, Sydney, Australia' while the Chinese lists '澳大利亚悉尼科技大学信息科学工程部'. The Chinese version is used for the organization name.

The 'Part-time Academic Jobs' section contains roles and memberships but no explicit organization names for some entries (e.g., '国家科技奖励和北京市科技奖励评审专家组成员'). These are not extracted as separate experiences due to lack of clear organization and date boundaries.
The 'Awards' section contains two entries with inconsistent naming and no clear year. Both are included as separate awards.
The 'Publications' section heading contained an instruction to list 5 papers, which was followed by a list. The instruction line is ignored.
